name: Resveratrol
description: A powerful polyphenol antioxidant from grape skin that activates longevity genes and protects skin from aging.
scientificSummary: Activates sirtuin-1 (SIRT1), a longevity gene that regulates cellular aging, inflammation, and DNA repair in skin cells.
mechanismOfAction: Acts as a SIRT1 activator and potent scavenger of ROS, upregulating the skin's own antioxidant defense enzymes.

seo.title: Resveratrol - Longevity Antioxidant from Grapes | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Resveratrol activates skin's longevity genes to fight photo-aging and oxidative damage.
